settings.heading: Shipping
settings.content: We are based in Dubai however we have a warehouse in Dhaka, hence shipments all over Bangladesh take only 2-4 days and cost 100 Taka.

settings.heading: Return & Refund Policy
settings.content:
1.1 Return Due To Change Of Mind

Exotic Leaf will happily accept returns due to change of mind as long as a request to return is received by us within 72 hours of receipt of item. 

Once approved, refunds will be processed to their original payment method. We will notify you once this has been completed through email.

Exotic Leaf will refund the value of the goods returned but will NOT refund the value of any shipping paid.

1.2 Cancellations

If you change your mind before a tracking numbers has been generated, we are able to accept cancellations at any time before the order has been dispatched. If an order has already been dispatched, please refer to our refund policy.

settings.text: Shilajit is sourced from the Himalayas. These capsules enhance energy levels, boosts immunity with antioxidants, reduces stress, sharpens mental clarity, and promotes improved sexual activity. Additionally, it increases strength, endurance, and stamina while facilitating quicker muscle recovery. Packed with fulvic acid and essential minerals, these capsules support overall wellness and vitality.

settings.heading: Why Shilajit is the best way to increase stamina?

settings.text: Combine Ashwagandha, Gokshura, Safed Musli, Sudh Shilajit, and Swaran Bhasam for powerful synergy. Ashwagandha reduces stress and boosts vitality, Gokshura supports urinary and reproductive health, Safed Musli enhances sexual performance, Sudh Shilajit increases energy and aids muscle recovery, and Swaran Bhasam enhances immunity and vitality. Together, these ingredients work to improve energy levels, sexual health, immunity, and stress resilience.
noticed overall higher energy levels & lower stress

settings.title: We guarantee higher energy levels
settings.text: * Results according to consumer studies. All data collected through customer call surveys.

Shilajit caters to a wide range of individuals, including fitness enthusiasts aiming to boost endurance and recovery, couples seeking to enhance sexual health, and those managing stress who desire increased energy and mental clarity.

They provide a natural solution to optimize physical vitality, mental focus, and overall well-being.

settings.faq-ques: How long will one container last?
settings.faq-content: Each container has 10 grams. Enough for a month's supply!
100% Pure Himalayan Shilajit, Swarna Bhasma, Ashwagandha , Gokshura & Black Musli. These clinically tested Ayurvedic ingredients are safe to consume and provide desired results with regular usage.

Start slowly: If you're new to Shilajit begin with a small quantity and gradually increase the amount as the body adapts. Certain people may feel a warm or energizing sensation after consumption.

Keep hydrated: Drink plenty of water throughout the day in order to enhance the efficacy of Shilajit and ensure that you are hydrated overall.

Get a professional's advice: If you're pregnant or nursing, suffer from an underlying health condition or are taking any medications you should consult a medical professional prior to adding a new supplement to your regimen.

Combine with a Balanced Diet: Shilajit is an aid but not a substitute for eating a balanced diet. Always nourish your body by eating a wide variety of nutrient-rich food items.

Consistency is the Key: While individual responses can differ, consistent use over time is usually recommended to enjoy the full array of advantages Shilajit provides.
